title: RevokePermitRequest
description: Wire payload sent to POST /v1-revoke-permit. Invalidates a previously-issued permit so it can no longer pass verifyPermit.

decision_id.description: The decision_id returned by a prior /v1-evaluate call. This is the permit to revoke.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for revocation. Stored in the audit log.

api_key.description: API key echoed in the body. Also sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>.
